intended_use: IRISeg is intended for use as a software application that receives DICOM compliant contrast-enhanced CT images, provides manual and machine learning-enabled tools for image analysis and segmentation,
intended_use_full: IRISeg is intended for use as a software application that receives DICOM compliant contrast-enhanced CT images, provides manual and machine learning-enabled tools for image analysis and segmentation, and creates an output file that can be used to render a 3D model for preoperative surgical planning and intraoperative display.
ground_truth: Consensus segmentation from three U.S. Board Certified Radiologists
other_metrics: Artery Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC): [0.87, 0.90]; Parenchyma DSC: [0.95, 0.97]; Vein DSC: [0.87, 0.89]; Collecting System Mean Distance to Agreement (MDA): [1.3, 1.9] mm. All metrics reported as 95% two-sided t-statistic confidence intervals.
